headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Attack Kills Two U.S. Troops; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
summary: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. service members. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also report.

headline: GE VERNOVA INC (NYSE:GEV) Shows High Growth Momentum and Breakout Setup
summary: GE Vernova (GEV) combines accelerating earnings and revenue growth with strong technicals, forming a consolidation pattern near support for a potential breakout entry.
